steps.title: Welcome to Birju.AI
steps.description: When a new user visits Birju.AI, they land on a clean and minimal home dashboard. It greets them as ‘Birju’s Guest’ and offers to start their first counselling session.
actions: Click on ‘Start Counsel Now!!’ to begin your journey.

steps.title: Sign In or Sign Up
steps.description: Before using Birju.AI, the user needs to log in or sign up. Once logged in, their name will appear at the bottom-left corner of the sidebar.

steps.title: Exploring the Dashboard
steps.description: After login, the main sidebar becomes your control panel. It contains two key options for guidance and learning.
features: 💬 New Counsel – for personalized career guidance

steps.title: Generating a New Counsel
steps.description: Click ‘New Counsel’ to get personalized advice. A popup form appears asking for a few details about you.
steps.action: After filling this, click Generate Counsel.

steps.title: Viewing Your Counsel Report
steps.description: Once generated, a Counsel Card appears in your sidebar list. You can create multiple counsels, each saved for future reference.

includes: 💼 2–3 Job Roles (based on your education and intent)

steps.title: Creating a New Roadmap
steps.description: Switch to the Roadmap tab using the top toggle. Fill out the form to generate your personalized learning roadmap.
form_fields: ⏳ Duration (how long you want the plan for)
roadmap_features: Each roadmap has multiple stages with estimated duration.
Each stage covers skills, projects, or concepts to complete.

steps.title: Tracking Your Progress
steps.description: Each roadmap includes a progress bar at the top that fills as you complete stages, giving a quick view of your journey.

steps.title: Taking Quizzes
steps.description: At the bottom of each roadmap is the Quiz section with stage-wise quizzes (S1, S2, S3, etc.).
quiz_flow: Click ‘Generate New Quiz’ to create an AI-generated test.
Stage button turns yellow when quiz is generated.
Turns green (✅) if passed, red (❌) if failed.
Passing a quiz unlocks the next stage.

steps.title: Rewards & Streak System
steps.description: To make learning exciting and consistent, Birju.AI uses a reward and streak system.
rules: 💯 Completing an entire roadmap gives +100 points.
🔥 Each consecutive quiz passed increases your streak.
❌ Failing a quiz resets your streak.
steps.note: You can view your points and streak anytime in the sidebar.

steps.title: Managing Counsels & Roadmaps
steps.description: You can create multiple Counsels or Roadmaps. All are saved and neatly listed in the sidebar for quick access.
features: Old quizzes (only the last 4 per stage) are automatically managed.
Easily switch between Counsels and Roadmaps from the sidebar.

steps.title: 🎉 That’s It! You’re All Set
steps.description: Birju.AI acts like your personal AI career mentor — guiding you with clarity, structured roadmaps, and progress tracking, while keeping you motivated through streaks and rewards.
